title: I Need You
wikitext:
[]: I Need You             Quote Post by SHINOBI-03 » Thu Jun 23, 2011 10:04 am This was another thing that caught my attention in the EOE movie. Before Maya turns into LCL, we see Ritsuko types "I Need You." in Maya's laptop before she gives her the hug of death. What's the meaning behind it? Who needs whom? Maya needs Ritsuko? Or Ritsuko needs Maya? And does it reflect Maya's inner love/admiration for her superior?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 23, 2011 10:08 am I suggest reading this: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=355299#355299

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Thu Jun 23, 2011 10:21 am Also: That's not a J, it's an enter sign (Look at all the "J's" above it).

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Jun 23, 2011 11:09 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I suggest reading this: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=355299#355299

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Jun 24, 2011 1:56 pm thewayneiac wrote: Or here's the Wiki page version, with all the images intact: [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_Analysis:Gendo%27s_Silent_Words[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by SHINOBI-03 » Sun Jun 26, 2011 10:21 am liquidus118 wrote: Also: That's not a J, it's an enter sign (Look at all the "J's" above it).

Before Maya turns into LCL, we see Ritsuko types "I Need You." in Maya's laptop before she gives her the hug of death. What's the meaning behind it? Who needs whom? Maya needs Ritsuko? Or Ritsuko needs Maya? And does it reflect Maya's inner love/admiration for her superior?
